hooks.name: quality-reminder
hooks.description: Reminds agent to validate after significant code changes
hooks.message: Before moving on: Does this change compile? Did you check types, imports, and call sites? Run lint/tests if available.

hooks.name: qa-checkpoint
hooks.description: Prompts QA considerations after test file changes
hooks.message: QA check: Does this test cover the happy path, error cases, and edge cases? Are mocks realistic? Would a regression in the tested code be caught?

hooks.name: migration-safety
hooks.description: Safety check before committing migration files
hooks.message: Migration safety: Is this idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS)? Are there duplicate timestamps? Does it include rollback considerations? Have you tested locally?
